channel.title: golang on Sivaram Sajeev
channel.description: Recent content in golang on Sivaram Sajeev

item.title: Hugo theme first looks
item.description: Hugo has been amazing so far and the theme I’ve chosen is Hugo.386. I just loved the old windows look. Plus, I’ve been trying out the stack theme as well. “Theme Stack designed by Jimmy”. It’s great to have so many themes to choose from.
